degradations.guidance: Do not lead with ordering when no verified order route exists. Shift to directions or menu exploration.
Keep menu language anchored to on-page highlights and avoid implying a full verified external menu.
Do not promise open-now convenience or late-service claims until hours are verified.
If no exterior image exists, keep the gallery food-first and let maps carry location trust.
If no exterior photo exists, keep the gallery dish-led and let location trust come from maps/contact blocks.
Keep the copy visit-led or menu-led when no verified order flow exists.
Talk about menu highlights on-page instead of implying a complete external menu.
Do not mention open-now, opening windows, or easy late-night availability.
adjustments: stick to address and call cues

degradations.guidance: Summarize review themes instead of writing quote-style proof.
If no exterior photo exists, keep the gallery dish-led and let location trust come from maps/contact blocks.
Keep the menu action anchored to on-page highlights and services when no verified external menu exists.
adjustments: promote popular items before deeper sections

degradations.guidance: Use rating and review themes instead of quoted testimonials when no direct quotes are verified.
adjustments: theme list instead of quote cards

degradations.guidance: Tighten the gallery when approved image variety is limited.
Do not surface opening hours until they are verified.

suppressedClaims: Do not invent hours, prices, offers, awards, lead times, or reservation support.
Do not claim a website, order flow, email route, or WhatsApp route unless verified.
Do not use unverified superlatives like best, leading, number one, or award-winning.
Do not fabricate team names, certifications, or years in business.
Do not promise online ordering, reservations, or a full menu URL when those routes are missing.
Do not say open now, open daily, late night, or list hours.
Do not say order online, checkout, or delivery now.
Do not imply a verified full external menu URL.
Do not present testimonial quotes or quote marks as if direct quotes exist.
ghostsAvoided: No CTA is rendered without a real href.
No hidden section keeps a live footer link.
No menu URL is implied when only on-page highlights exist.
No testimonial quote UI appears when direct quotes are absent.
